changes.change: Completed ContextGraph class with all 21 public methods delegating to rebuilt phases, search, and storage
Added relationship_count() and file_count() methods for CLI status reporting
Fixed docstring extraction: content=sym.docstring in GraphNode construction
New file: AST-based signature extraction and comparison for contract checking
New file: Mermaid and DOT graph rendering with BFS subgraph collection
New file: 6 workflow integration functions with graceful degradation pattern

verification.details: All 21 ContextGraph methods implemented and tested
All 6 workflow functions pass tests with confidence lookup bug fixed
118/118 tests pass, 18 CLI subcommands verified working

commit.message: feat(context-graph): complete integration — all 21 API methods, workflow, CLI, full test suite
